creator: Mark.Martinec@ijs.si
text:
Interesting. Tried with INNOBASE enabled and it does not make it fail
here today.

Comparing the successful and the failed build log the lex_token.h
generating step is missing entirely in the failed log:

[1361/1794] /usr/local/libexec/ccache/c++  -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -DHAVE_EVENT_SCHEDULER -DHAVE_OPENSSL -DHAVE_POOL_OF_THREADS -DMYSQL_SERVER -Iinclude -Isql -Ipcre
-Iwsrep -I/usr/local/include -O2 -pipe -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include
 -DWITH_INNODB_DISALLOW_WRITES -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -O2 -pipe -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing
 -isystem /usr/local/include -DDBUG_OFF -MD -MT sql/CMakeFiles/gen_lex_token.dir/gen_lex_token.cc.o -MF sql/CMakeFiles/gen_lex_token.dir/gen_lex_token.cc.o.d
-o sql/CMakeFiles/gen_lex_token.dir/gen_lex_token.cc.o -c sql/gen_lex_token.cc
[1362/1794] : && /usr/local/libexec/ccache/c++  -O2 -pipe -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem
 /usr/local/include -DWITH_INNODB_DISALLOW_WRITES -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -O2 -pipe -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -f
no-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include -DDBUG_OFF  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector sql/CMakeFiles/gen_lex_token.dir/gen_lex_token.cc.o  -
o sql/gen_lex_token  -pthread && :
[1363/1794] cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb101-server/work/mariadb-10.1.26/sql && /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/mariadb101-server/work/mariadb-10.1.26/sql/gen_lex_token > lex_token.h

Perhaps this has something to do with ccache use in poudriere, or could
be prevented by MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes. Just guessing.
